name: HR payroll specialists in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll summaries/month tool
description: For HR payroll specialists in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll summaries/month, inefficient data handling causes late payroll submissions. We automate the formatting of time-tracking data instead of manual data entry and formatting.
target_audience: HR payroll specialists in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll summaries/month
problem_solved: Inefficient conversion of time-tracking data into payroll summaries
